message.content: The HAZE highlight block appears to have an **alignment issue**—the orange background block is likely misaligned (either shifted left/right or not centered) relative to the surrounding content or its intended position, creating an uneven or off - centered visual. For the TWITCH subtitle text, the problem is that it is **missing or not visible** in the provided screenshot, which is strange because a subtitle (like “TWITCH”) would typically be present to provide context for the “HAZE” highlight. This absence makes the element feel incomplete or improperly rendered.
